plan.changeDetail: Integrate DeepSeek as a new LLM provider in the Blacksmith application. This requires adding the Spring AI DeepSeek dependency, creating a DeepSeekChatClient service, updating the LLM router to support DeepSeek selection, and adding necessary configuration properties. The implementation follows the existing pattern of provider-specific chat clients (Anthropic, OpenAI, MiniMax).
risks: DeepSeek API availability and rate limits
Model compatibility with existing agent prompts
Configuration validation for new provider credentials

plannedTasks.description: Create DeepSeekProperties configuration class in config package
Create DeepSeekChatClient service class implementing LLM chat interface
Update LlmRouter to include DeepSeek provider option in routing logic
Add DeepSeek configuration properties to application.yml
